Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.proofBuilder

Class PredicateDecomposer

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.proofBuilder.PredicateDecomposer
All Implemented Interfaces:
ISimpleVisitor, ISimpleVisitor2
public class PredicateDecomposer extends Object implements ISimpleVisitor2
Visitor that decomposes a predicate into a set of subgoals. Clients shall use only the static method @{link #decompose}.
Since:
2.0

  • Method Details

    • decompose

      public static Set<Predicate> decompose(ISealedTypeEnvironment env, Predicate pred)
      Decompose a predicate into a set of subgoals.
      Parameters:
      env - type environment
      pred - the predicate to decompose
      Returns:
      list of the subgoals from the given predicate
